title: notholaena profusa
intro: Notholaena profusa, also known as the bushy club moss fern or bush fern, is a type of fern that belongs to the family Pteridaceae. Traditionally, Notholaena profusa has been used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits associated with Notholaena profusa include its potential to treat fever, sore throats, and digestive issues, as well as its use in skin care and wound healing. Notholaena profusa can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and salves for its medicinal and therapeutic uses.
